Overview Package Class Index No Frames Frames Prev Next

Summary: FUNCTION
xcfinfo

xcfinfo

FUNCTION Summary
public build_url(xcf_file STRING, protocol STRING, host STRING, port_override STRING) RETURNS STRING
Build the GAS browser URL for the application. URL format: protocol://host:port/genero/ua|ws/r/group/appname. "genero" is the Apache ProxyPass alias that forwards browser requests to the FastCGI dispatcher; it is not configurable from within GAS itself. The group is resolved by matching m_app.path against m_gas.groups, walking up the directory tree until a match is found or the path is exhausted.
public collect_env_vars() RETURNS xcftypes.t_env_var_list
Return the merged DVM environment variable list ready for display. Starts from the GAS execution component variables, then applies app-level overrides using APPEND, PREPEND, or replace semantics according to each entry's Concat attribute.
public expand_refs(s STRING) RETURNS STRING
Expand all $(name) resource-reference tokens in s (maximum 50 substitutions per call). Each $(name) token is replaced by the value returned by find_resource_value(). Iterates to handle chained references; the 50-iteration limit prevents infinite loops on circular resource definitions.
public extract_flag_value(line STRING, flag STRING) RETURNS STRING
Return the value of a named command-line flag from a process command-line string. Uses a sentinel prefix so that flags appearing at position 1 of the string are found.
public find_child_elem(parent xml.DomNode, tag STRING) RETURNS xml.DomNode
Return the first child element node whose tag name matches tag, or NULL.
public find_resource_value(id STRING) RETURNS STRING
Return the resolved value for a resource id. Searches m_gas.resources first; falls back to fgl_getenv() if not found.
public get_text(node xml.DomNode) RETURNS STRING
Return the trimmed text content of a DOM element node.
public load_dispatcher_groups()
Query the running fastcgidispatch process for its group file arguments. Reads --application-group and --service-group from the process command line via ps (Unix) or wmic (Windows), then loads the found files via parse_group_file().
public main()
public parse_app_xcf(filename STRING)
Parse the Genero application XCF file into m_app. Reads the application id, parent, execution path, module, and env var overrides. Also registers application.path as a resource so $(application.path) can be expanded.
public parse_as_xcf(filename STRING)
Parse the GAS server configuration file (as.xcf) into m_gas. Loads resources (PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT then UNX), execution component env vars, APPLICATION_LIST and SERVICE_LIST group-to-path mappings, and the TCP server port.
public parse_env_nodes(container xml.DomNode, list xcftypes.t_env_var_list) RETURNS xcftypes.t_env_var_list
Parse all ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLE child elements of container and append them to list.
public parse_group_file(filename STRING, group_type STRING)
Parse an APPLICATION_GROUPS or SERVICE_GROUPS XML file and append entries to m_gas.groups. Pass NULL for group_type to auto-detect the type from the root element name.
public parse_resource_nodes(container xml.DomNode)
Parse all RESOURCE child elements of container and load them into m_gas.resources.
public resolve_resources()
Resolve all $(resource) tokens across all parsed configuration data. Applies 10-pass chain resolution to m_gas.resources, then expands tokens in m_gas.exec_env, m_app.env_vars, m_gas.groups paths, m_app.path, and m_gas.server_port.
public upsert_resource(id STRING, source STRING, value STRING)
Add or update a resource entry in m_gas.resources. If an entry with the same id already exists it is updated in place; UNX-sourced entries therefore override PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT entries when loaded second.
public xcf_app_name(path STRING) RETURNS STRING
Return the GAS application name derived from an XCF file path. Strips the directory component and the .xcf extension from the path.

Functions

build_url

public FUNCTION build_url(xcf_file STRING, protocol STRING, host STRING, port_override STRING) RETURNS STRING

Build the GAS browser URL for the application. URL format: protocol://host:port/genero/ua|ws/r/group/appname. "genero" is the Apache ProxyPass alias that forwards browser requests to the FastCGI dispatcher; it is not configurable from within GAS itself. The group is resolved by matching m_app.path against m_gas.groups, walking up the directory tree until a match is found or the path is exhausted.

Parameters:
xcf_file - Path to the application XCF file (provides the app name).
protocol - URL protocol: "http" or "https".
host - Server hostname or IP address for the URL.
port_override - Port to use; NULL to read the port from as.xcf.
Returns:
The fully composed GAS browser URL string.

collect_env_vars

public FUNCTION collect_env_vars() RETURNS xcftypes.t_env_var_list

Return the merged DVM environment variable list ready for display. Starts from the GAS execution component variables, then applies app-level overrides using APPEND, PREPEND, or replace semantics according to each entry's Concat attribute.

Returns:
The merged t_env_var_list with all app-level overrides applied.

expand_refs

public FUNCTION expand_refs(s STRING) RETURNS STRING

Expand all $(name) resource-reference tokens in s (maximum 50 substitutions per call). Each $(name) token is replaced by the value returned by find_resource_value(). Iterates to handle chained references; the 50-iteration limit prevents infinite loops on circular resource definitions.

Parameters:
s - The string that may contain $(resource.name) tokens.
Returns:
The string with all resolvable tokens substituted by their values.

extract_flag_value

public FUNCTION extract_flag_value(line STRING, flag STRING) RETURNS STRING

Return the value of a named command-line flag from a process command-line string. Uses a sentinel prefix so that flags appearing at position 1 of the string are found.

Parameters:
line - The full command-line string to search.
flag - The flag name to locate (e.g. "--application-group").
Returns:
The token immediately following the flag, or NULL if the flag is absent.

find_child_elem

public FUNCTION find_child_elem(parent xml.DomNode, tag STRING) RETURNS xml.DomNode

Return the first child element node whose tag name matches tag, or NULL.

Parameters:
parent - The parent DOM node to search.
tag - The element tag name to match.
Returns:
The first matching child element, or NULL if none found.

find_resource_value

public FUNCTION find_resource_value(id STRING) RETURNS STRING

Return the resolved value for a resource id. Searches m_gas.resources first; falls back to fgl_getenv() if not found.

Parameters:
id - The resource identifier to look up.
Returns:
The resource value string, or the environment variable value if absent.

get_text

public FUNCTION get_text(node xml.DomNode) RETURNS STRING

Return the trimmed text content of a DOM element node.

Parameters:
node - The DOM element node whose text content is wanted.
Returns:
The trimmed text, or an empty string if no TEXT_NODE child exists.

load_dispatcher_groups

public FUNCTION load_dispatcher_groups()

Query the running fastcgidispatch process for its group file arguments. Reads --application-group and --service-group from the process command line via ps (Unix) or wmic (Windows), then loads the found files via parse_group_file().

main

public FUNCTION main()

parse_app_xcf

public FUNCTION parse_app_xcf(filename STRING)

Parse the Genero application XCF file into m_app. Reads the application id, parent, execution path, module, and env var overrides. Also registers application.path as a resource so $(application.path) can be expanded.

Parameters:
filename - Path to the application XCF file.

parse_as_xcf

public FUNCTION parse_as_xcf(filename STRING)

Parse the GAS server configuration file (as.xcf) into m_gas. Loads resources (PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT then UNX), execution component env vars, APPLICATION_LIST and SERVICE_LIST group-to-path mappings, and the TCP server port.

Parameters:
filename - Path to the as.xcf configuration file.

parse_env_nodes

public FUNCTION parse_env_nodes(container xml.DomNode, list xcftypes.t_env_var_list) RETURNS xcftypes.t_env_var_list

Parse all ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLE child elements of container and append them to list.

Parameters:
container - The parent DOM node containing ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLE elements.
list - The t_env_var_list to append the parsed entries to.
Returns:
The updated list with all newly parsed entries appended.

parse_group_file

public FUNCTION parse_group_file(filename STRING, group_type STRING)

Parse an APPLICATION_GROUPS or SERVICE_GROUPS XML file and append entries to m_gas.groups. Pass NULL for group_type to auto-detect the type from the root element name.

Parameters:
filename - Path to the groups XML file.
group_type - "ua" for APPLICATION_GROUPS, "ws" for SERVICE_GROUPS, NULL to auto-detect.

parse_resource_nodes

public FUNCTION parse_resource_nodes(container xml.DomNode)

Parse all RESOURCE child elements of container and load them into m_gas.resources.

Parameters:
container - The parent DOM node (PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT or UNX section).

resolve_resources

public FUNCTION resolve_resources()

Resolve all $(resource) tokens across all parsed configuration data. Applies 10-pass chain resolution to m_gas.resources, then expands tokens in m_gas.exec_env, m_app.env_vars, m_gas.groups paths, m_app.path, and m_gas.server_port.

upsert_resource

public FUNCTION upsert_resource(id STRING, source STRING, value STRING)

Add or update a resource entry in m_gas.resources. If an entry with the same id already exists it is updated in place; UNX-sourced entries therefore override PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT entries when loaded second.

Parameters:
id - The resource identifier (e.g. "res.ic.server.port").
source - The source attribute value (INTERNAL, ENVIRON, UNX, etc.).
value - The resource value string, possibly containing $(token) references.

xcf_app_name

public FUNCTION xcf_app_name(path STRING) RETURNS STRING

Return the GAS application name derived from an XCF file path. Strips the directory component and the .xcf extension from the path.

Parameters:
path - Full or relative path to the XCF file.
Returns:
The base filename without the .xcf extension.
